title: The Three Musketeers: Part I - The Queen's Diamonds
writer: Alexandre Dumas, Jean Bernard-Luc, Bernard Borderie
actors: Gérard Barray, Georges Descrières, Bernard Woringer
plot: In order to join the Musketeers, young D'Artagnan is embroiled in a plot in which Cardinal of Richelieu tries to take control of power from the King of France, along with Rochefort and Milady de Winter,
